image-reference.author: Kieran O'Donnell
image-reference.title: Location of sheeting for walls surrounding a bath

image.alt: Location of sheeting for walls surrounding a bath

ol.li: Taps, niches, soap holders and the like may be located within the positions designated for wall reinforcing.
Where the height of the bath tub is not yet known, an assumed height of 500 mm above finished floor level may be used to determine the location of wall reinforcing.
